source.note: FULL/verifiable port; office doc ported to TextEdit (gold image has no iWork); graded on saved file content

task.en: Create a Jamaica trip itinerary as a plain-text document using TextEdit. Look up the details in the seeded apps open in Safari if you need them: Dinoco Airlines http://localhost:3011 (the flight is DN1562) and Cheskepdia http://localhost:3012 (the Sandals Montego Bay hotel booking). In TextEdit, write an itinerary with three sections — Flight, Hotel, and Daily Schedule — that includes the flight number DN1562 and the Sandals Montego Bay hotel. Save it as a plain-text file at ~/Documents/Trips/jamaica_itinerary.txt (create the Trips folder if needed; use Format > Make Plain Text).

grading_command: ls ~/Documents/Trips/ 2>/dev/null | grep -qi jamaica && echo True || echo False
